---
title: "UDS_Final_Project"
author: "Gaurav Law"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r install packages, warning=FALSE}

install.packages("renv")

# 1. Install all standard CRAN packages
renv::install(c(
  "tidyverse", "xgboost", "randomForest", "broom", "janitor", 
  "pROC", "reshape2", "caret", "purrr", "fuzzyjoin", "gt", 
  "gtExtras", "prismatic", "ggrepel", "scales", "ggimage", 
  "rvest", "stringi", "AdvancedBasketballStats", "hoopR"
))

# 2. Install the GitHub-only packages
renv::install(c(
  "lbenz730/ncaahoopR",
  "andreweatherman/toRvik",
  "andreweatherman/cbbdata"
))

renv::snapshot()
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(xgboost)
library(randomForest)
library(broom)
library(janitor)
library(pROC)
library(reshape2)
library(caret)
library(purrr)
library(fuzzyjoin)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(gtExtras)
library(prismatic)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
library(purrr)
library(ggimage)

library(hoopR)
library(ncaahoopR)
library(toRvik)
library(AdvancedBasketballStats)
library(cbbdata)
library(rvest)
library(stringi)
```

```{r}

# Player box stats 2003-2026
player_03_26_load <- hoopR::load_mbb_player_box(seasons = c(2003:2026))

player_03_26 <- player_03_26_load %>%
  filter(!is.nan(minutes) & !is.na(minutes)) %>%
  group_by(athlete_id, season) %>%
  reframe(team_id, athlete_display_name, athlete_position_name, athlete_headshot_href,
          team_location, team_logo,
          across(
            c(minutes:points),
            ~ round(mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
            ),
          games = n()) %>%
  #filter(minutes >= 15 & games >= 19) %>%
  distinct()

```

```{r draft data 2005-25}

scrape_nba_draft <- function(years) {
  
  scrape_single_year <- function(year) {
    url <- paste0("https://www.basketball-reference.com/draft/NBA_", year, ".html")
    
    tryCatch({
      full_table <- read_html(url)
      
      draft <- full_table %>%
        html_nodes("table") %>%
        .[[1]] %>%
        html_table(fill = TRUE)
      
      # Set first row as column names and remove it
      colnames(draft) <- draft[1, ]
      draft <- draft[-1, ]
      
      # Remove duplicate header rows that appear mid-table
      draft <- draft[draft[[1]] != colnames(draft)[1], ]
      
      # Add year column for reference
      draft$draft_year <- year
      
      message("Successfully scraped ", year, " NBA Draft (", nrow(draft), " rows)")
      return(draft)
      
    }, error = function(e) {
      warning("Failed to scrape year ", year, ": ", e$message)
      return(NULL)
    })
  }
  
  # Scrape all years and bind into one data frame
  all_drafts <- lapply(years, function(y) {
    Sys.sleep(3)
    scrape_single_year(y)
  })
  
  # Drop any failed years and combine
  all_drafts <- Filter(Negate(is.null), all_drafts)
  combined <- bind_rows(all_drafts)
  
  return(combined)
}

player_03_26 %>%
  filter(athlete_display_name == "Ike Diogu")

all_years <- c(2005:2025)

# Run the scraper
draft_data <- scrape_nba_draft(all_years)


```

```{r}
# Look at name differences between players in the dataframes
#setdiff(draft_upd$Player, player_03_26$athlete_display_name)
```

```{r}

# Look at case by case data manipulation
draft_upd <- draft_data %>%
  select(Pk, Player, College, draft_year) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~na_if(., "")),
         Season = draft_year,
         Pk = as.integer(Pk),
         Player = stri_trans_general(Player, "Latin-ASCII"),
         Player = case_when(
           Player == "V.J. Edgecombe" ~ "VJ Edgecombe",
           Player == "J.J. Hickson" ~ "JJ Hickson",
           Player == "Patrick Ewing" ~ "Patrick Ewing Jr.",
           Player == "Marcus Morris" ~ "Marcus Morris Sr.",
           Player == "Jeff Taylor" ~ "Jeffery Taylor",
           Player == "Robbie Hummel" ~ "Robbie John Hummel",
           Player == "K.J. McDaniels" ~ "KJ McDaniels",
           Player == "R.J. Hunter" ~ "RJ Hunter",
           Player == "A.J. Hammons" ~ "AJ Hammons",
           Player == "Harry Giles" ~ "Harry Giles III",
           Player == "Wade Baldwin" ~ "Wade Baldwin IV",
           Player == "Kevin Knox" ~ "Kevin Knox II",
           Player == "Vince Edwards" ~ "Vincent Edwards",
           Player == "Tristan Da Silva" ~ "Tristan da Silva",
           Player == "DaRon Holmes" ~ "DaRon Holmes II",
           Player == "Egor Dёmin" ~ "Egor Demin",
           TRUE ~ Player
         )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Player),
         !is.na(Pk),
         !is.na(College),
         Player != "Player")

player_03_26 <- player_03_26 %>%
  mutate(athlete_display_name = case_when(
    athlete_display_name == "Robbie John Hummel" ~ "Robbie Hummel",
    athlete_display_name == "Pierre Deshawn Jackson" ~ "Pierre Jackson",
    athlete_display_name == "Erik Jay Murphy" ~ "Erik Murphy",
    athlete_display_name == "Johnny O'Bryant III" ~ "Johnny O'Bryant",
    athlete_display_name == "O.G. Anunoby" ~ "OG Anunoby",
    athlete_display_name == "Xavier Tillman" ~ "Xavier Tillman Sr.",
    athlete_display_name == "GG Jackson" ~ "GG Jackson II",
    athlete_display_name == "Carlton Carrington" ~ "Bub Carrington",
    TRUE ~ athlete_display_name
  ))

player_03_26 <- player_03_26 %>%
  group_by(athlete_id) %>%
  mutate(num_years_college = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Since data only starts in 2005, we manually went through 2004-2008 to get the real number of years a player spent in college
draft_pre_08 <- read_csv("~/Downloads/draft_pre_08.csv") # change to data/
#draft_pre_08 <- read_csv("data/draft_pre_08.csv")


```

```{r}
draft_full <- draft_upd %>%
  left_join(player_03_26, by = c(Player = "athlete_display_name", Season = "season")) %>%
  left_join(draft_pre_08, by = c("Player", "College", "draft_year", "Season", "Pk")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(minutes)) %>%
  mutate(num_years_college = ifelse(Season <= 2008, num_years_college.y, num_years_college.x)) %>%
  select(-c(num_years_college.x, num_years_college.y))
```

```{r bind rows 2026}

# # Combine with 2026 players' data
# player_26 <- load_mbb_player_box(seasons = 2026) %>%
#   group_by(athlete_id) %>%
#   reframe(athlete_display_name, team_location,
#     round(across(where(is.numeric), mean, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
#     games = n()) %>%
#   distinct() %>%
#   mutate(impact = 0) %>%
#   filter(minutes >= 15 & games >= 14) %>%
#   select(-c(opponent_team_id, opponent_team_score, team_score, team_id,
#             athlete_id, game_id, season_type, fouls)) %>%
#   rename("player" = "athlete_display_name",
#          "Season" = "season")

```

```{r impact}
# Impact factor: Calculated by Gaurav Law (have used in multiple projects for MCBB + WCBB)
# Used AI to help with function but formula has been used many times
calculate_season_impact <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    group_by(Season) %>% 
    mutate(
      `net rtg` = ortg - drtg
    ) %>%
    drop_na(`net rtg`, usg, mpg) %>%
    mutate(
      # Net Rating Standardization
      mean_rtg = mean(`net rtg`),
      sd_rtg = sd(`net rtg`),
      net_std = round((`net rtg` - mean_rtg) / sd_rtg, 2),
      
      # Minutes Standardization 
      min_sd = sd(mpg),
      min_std = round(mpg / min_sd, 2),
      
      # Combined Net * Min Score
      raw_net_min = net_std * min_std,
      max_raw_net_min = max(raw_net_min, na.rm = TRUE),
      net_min_std = round(raw_net_min / max_raw_net_min, 2),
      
      # PER Standardization
      pfr_mpg = pfr * mpg,
      mean_per = mean(pfr_mpg),
      sd_per = sd(pfr_mpg),
      per_std = round((pfr_mpg - mean_per) / sd_per, 2)
    ) %>%
    
    # Impact Score Calculation (max = 25 per season)
    mutate(
      term_1 = net_min_std - min(net_min_std, na.rm = TRUE),
      term_2 = per_std - min(per_std, na.rm = TRUE),
      raw_impact_score = usg * term_1 * term_2,
      max_season_impact = max(raw_impact_score, na.rm = TRUE),
      impact = round(raw_impact_score / (max_season_impact / 25), 3)
    ) %>%
    
    # Filter for eligible players
    filter(mpg >= 15 & g >= 19) %>%
    mutate(
      fgm = round(fgm / g, 1),
      ftm = round(ftm / g, 1),
      fta = round(fta / g, 1),
      three_m = round(three_m / g, 1),
      three_a = round(three_a / g, 1)
    ) %>%
    select(-mean_rtg, -sd_rtg, -min_sd, -mean_per, -sd_per, 
           -term_1, -term_2, -raw_net_min, -max_raw_net_min, 
           -raw_impact_score, -max_season_impact) %>%
    
    ungroup()
}

cbb_ovr <- calculate_season_impact(cbb_player)

cbb_ovr <- cbb_ovr %>%
  left_join(player_03_26, by = c(player = "athlete_display_name", Season = "season")) %>%
  select(player, Season, team_location, minutes, points, rebounds, assists, blocks, steals,
         offensive_rebounds, defensive_rebounds, turnovers, field_goals_made, field_goals_attempted,
         free_throws_made, free_throws_attempted, three_point_field_goals_made,
         three_point_field_goals_attempted, games, impact, pick) %>%
  bind_rows(player_26)

```

# Predict impact for 2026

```{r}
target <- "impact"

exclude_vars <- c("player",
                  "Season",
                  "team_location",
                  "pick",
                  target)

features <- setdiff(names(cbb_ovr), exclude_vars)
```

```{r xgb model predicting impact}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2026) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2026) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our impact predictions
testing$impact <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

testing <- testing %>%
  mutate(impact = round(impact, 3)) %>%
  arrange(-impact)


```

## Backtesting for impact score (GREAT!!)

### DO NOT RUN BEFORE "NBA Draft projections"

```{r 2025}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2025) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2025) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

```{r 2023}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2023) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2023) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

```{r 2022}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2022) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2022) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

```{r 2021}

training <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season < 2021) %>% ungroup()
testing <- cbb_ovr %>% filter(Season == 2021) %>% ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$preds <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

# Calculate RMSE
actuals <- testing[[target]]

# Find RMSE of our test set
rmse_xg <- sqrt(mean((testing$preds - actuals)^2))

testing <- testing %>%
  select(player, team_location, Season, preds, impact)


cat("RMSE:", round(rmse_xg, 4))
```

# NBA Draft projections

```{r NBA Draft projections}
# 
# conf <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Data Testing/Pacers Project/conferences.csv") %>%
#   filter(Season == 2025 & Division == "D1") %>%
#   select(Team, Conference)
# 
# testing <- testing %>%
#   left_join(conf, by = c(team_location = "Team")) %>%
#   mutate(impact = case_when(Conference %in% c("SEC", "ACC", "Big 12", "Big Ten", "Big East") ~
#                               impact + 0.1*impact,
#                             .default = impact)) %>%
#   arrange(-impact) %>%
#   select(-Conference)
# 
# # Scraped NBA draft projections, per NBADraft.net
# proj_picks_draft <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Data Testing/Pacers Project/pred_picks.csv") %>%
#   select(-c(...1, Team)) %>%
#   filter(Pick <= 60)
# 
# testing <- testing %>%
#   select(-pick) %>%
#   stringdist_left_join(
#     proj_picks_draft,
#     by = c(player = "Player", team_location = "School"),
#     method = "jw",
#     max_dist = 0.15,
#     distance_col = "dist"
#   ) %>%
#   filter(!is.na(Pick)) %>%
#   select(-c(Player, School, player.dist, team_location.dist, dist)) %>%
#   rename("pick" = "Pick") %>%
#   arrange(pick)
# 
# 
# cbb_ovr <- cbb_ovr %>%
#   filter(!player %in% c(proj_picks_draft$Player)) %>%
#   bind_rows(testing)

darko <- read_csv("~/Desktop/Understanding Data Science/SP26_IDS701_UDS_Project/data/darko_history.csv") # change to data/darko_history.csv
#darko <- read_csv("data/darko_history.csv")

darko <- darko %>%
  filter(season >= 2002) %>%
  select(player_name, season, age, dpm, dpm_rank, o_dpm, d_dpm) %>%
  group_by(player_name) %>%
  # Grabs the 5 earliest seasons for each player
  slice_min(order_by = season, n = 5) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  # Sorting by player and season makes the output easy to read
  arrange(player_name, season) %>%
  rename(nba_season = season) %>%
  # Remove accents, tildes, umlauts
  mutate(player_name = stri_trans_general(player_name, "Latin-ASCII"))

draft_test <- draft_full %>%
  #filter(Season != 2004) %>%
  select(-Season)

preds <- draft_test %>%
  stringdist_left_join(darko, by = c(Player = "player_name")) %>%
  relocate(nba_season, .after = draft_year) %>%
  mutate(dpm = ifelse(is.na(dpm), median(dpm, na.rm = TRUE), dpm))

# Pad each player up to five seasons
preds <- preds %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    n_missing <- 5 - nrow(.x)
    if (n_missing <= 0) return(.x)
    
    last_season <- max(.x$nba_season)
    
    new_rows <- tibble(
      nba_season            = last_season + seq_len(n_missing),
      dpm                   = -5,
      Pk                    = .x$Pk[1],
      College               = .x$College[1],
      draft_year            = .x$draft_year[1],
      athlete_id            = .x$athlete_id[1],
      athlete_position_name = .x$athlete_position_name[1],
      num_years_college     = .x$num_years_college[1]
    )
    
    bind_rows(.x, new_rows)
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

nba_did <- preds %>%
  select(Player, athlete_id, num_years_college, dpm)


```

```{r}
target <- "dpm"

exclude_vars <- c("player",
                  "impact",
                  target)

features <- setdiff(names(projections), exclude_vars)
```

```{r}
training <- projections %>% 
  filter(dpm != 0 | player %in% c("Kris Dunn", "Miles Bridges")) %>% 
  ungroup()
testing <- projections %>% 
  filter(dpm == 0 & (!player %in% c("Kris Dunn",
                                       "Miles Bridges",
                                       "Bobby Portis"))) %>% 
  ungroup()

set.seed(123)

dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(training[, features]), 
                      label = training[[target]])
dtest  <- xgb.DMatrix(data = as.matrix(testing[, features]), 
                      label = testing[[target]])

# Train the model
xgb_model <- xgboost(
  data = dtrain,
  objective = "reg:squarederror",
  nrounds = 100,
  eta = 0.1,
  max_depth = 4,
  verbose = 0
)

# Calculate our transfer predictions
testing$dpm <- predict(xgb_model, newdata = dtest)

testing <- testing %>%
  mutate(pick_factor = 0.2*pick + abs(0.8*dpm - 0.2*impact)) %>%
  reframe(player, dpm, impact, pick_factor) %>%
  arrange(pick_factor) %>%
  mutate(proj_pick = 1:n())

logos <- load_mbb_player_box(seasons = 2026) %>%
  select(athlete_display_name, athlete_headshot_href, team_logo)

testing <- testing %>%
  left_join(logos, by = c(player = "athlete_display_name")) %>%
  distinct()

sort_data <- testing %>%
  select(proj_pick, player, athlete_headshot_href, team_logo, pick_factor, dpm, impact) %>%
  mutate(athlete_headshot_href = ifelse(is.na(athlete_headshot_href), team_logo, athlete_headshot_href),
         pick_factor = round(pick_factor, 3),
         dpm = round(dpm, 3),
         impact = round(impact, 3))

sort_gt <- sort_data %>%
  gt(id = "sorted_gt") %>%
  text_transform(locations = cells_body(c(athlete_headshot_href, team_logo)),
    fn = function(x) {
      web_image(
        url = x,
        height = 50
      )
    }) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center") %>%
           cols_label(player = "Player",
                      athlete_headshot_href = "",
                      team_logo = "Team",
                      proj_pick = "Proj. Pick",
                      pick_factor = "DPM + Impact Score",
                      impact = "Impact Score",
                      dpm = "DARKO DPM") %>%
  tab_header(title = "Pacers Projected Top Pick",
             subtitle = "2026 Draft") %>%
  gtExtras::gt_theme_espn() %>%
  data_color(columns = c(dpm, impact),
             palette = c("darkred", "red", "indianred", "white", "steelblue", "blue", "darkblue"))

sort_gt
```

```{r}
nba_did <- read_csv("data/nba_did.csv")
```

```{r memo_data_prep, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
nba_plot <- nba_did %>%
  group_by(Player) %>%
  mutate(nba_year = row_number()) %>%
  filter(nba_year <= 5,
         num_years_college %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(college_label = case_when(
    num_years_college == 1 ~ "1 Year (One-and-Done)",
    num_years_college == 2 ~ "2 Years",
    num_years_college == 3 ~ "3 Years",
    num_years_college == 4 ~ "4 Years"
  ),
  college_label = factor(college_label, 
                         levels = c("1 Year (One-and-Done)", "2 Years", "3 Years", "4 Years")))

group_counts <- nba_plot %>%
  distinct(Player, college_label) %>%
  count(college_label) %>%
  mutate(label_with_n = paste0(college_label, " (n=", n, ")"))

nba_plot <- nba_plot %>%
  left_join(group_counts, by = "college_label")

tenure_colors <- c("1 Year (One-and-Done)" = "#1b9e77", 
                    "2 Years" = "#d95f02", 
                    "3 Years" = "#7570b3", 
                    "4 Years" = "#e7298a")
```

```{r fig1_dpm_trajectories, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Figure 1: Mean DARKO DPM trajectories over the first five NBA seasons, grouped by years spent in college."}
trajectory_data <- nba_plot %>%
  group_by(college_label, label_with_n, nba_year) %>%
  summarize(mean_dpm = mean(dpm, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(trajectory_data, aes(x = nba_year, y = mean_dpm, 
                             color = college_label, group = college_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:5, labels = paste("Year", 1:5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tenure_colors,
                     labels = trajectory_data %>% 
                       distinct(college_label, label_with_n) %>% 
                       pull(label_with_n)) +
  labs(title = "NBA Performance Trajectories by College Tenure",
       x = "NBA Season (Years Since Draft)",
       y = "Mean DARKO DPM",
       color = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-4.5, 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

```{r fig2_survivorship, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Figure 2: NBA roster survival rates over five seasons by college tenure."}
survival_data <- nba_plot %>%
  group_by(college_label, nba_year) %>%
  summarize(total = n(),
            still_active = sum(dpm > -5.0),
            pct_active = still_active / total * 100,
            .groups = "drop")

ggplot(survival_data, aes(x = nba_year, y = pct_active, 
                           color = college_label, group = college_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3, shape = 15) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:5, labels = paste("Year", 1:5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tenure_colors) +
  labs(title = "NBA Roster Survival Rate by College Tenure",
       x = "NBA Season (Years Since Draft)",
       y = "% Still on NBA Roster",
       color = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 105)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

```{r fig3_rookie_boxplot, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, echo=FALSE, fig.cap="Figure 3: Distribution of rookie-year DPM by college tenure (excluding players who left the league)."}
rookie_data <- nba_plot %>%
  filter(nba_year == 1, dpm > -5.0)

ggplot(rookie_data, aes(x = college_label, y = dpm, fill = college_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = 1, outlier.size = 2, width = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tenure_colors) +
  labs(title = "Rookie Year Performance Distribution by College Tenure",
       x = "Years in College",
       y = "Rookie Year DARKO DPM") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

```{r summary_table, echo=FALSE}
summary_tbl <- nba_plot %>%
  distinct(Player, num_years_college, college_label) %>%
  group_by(college_label) %>%
  summarize(n_players = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(
    nba_plot %>%
      filter(nba_year == 1) %>%
      group_by(college_label) %>%
      summarize(yr1_dpm = round(mean(dpm), 2), .groups = "drop"),
    by = "college_label"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    nba_plot %>%
      group_by(college_label) %>%
      summarize(pct_left = round(sum(dpm == -5.0) / n_distinct(Player) * 100, 1),
                .groups = "drop"),
    by = "college_label"
  )

summary_tbl %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    college_label = "College Tenure",
    n_players = "Players (n)",
    yr1_dpm = "Year 1 DPM",
    pct_left = "Left NBA by Yr 5 (%)"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(title = "Summary Statistics by College Tenure Cohort") %>%
  cols_align(align = "center") %>%
  gtExtras::gt_theme_espn()
```
